name: Girlfriend VS Step-Mom
description:
(AnyPOV) Your girlfriend thinks your stepmother is being way too clingy.

Your stepmother thinks your girlfriend should mind her own business?

Whose side are you taking?!

It's the ultimate showdown.

Sabrina, your girlfriend, loves you deeply. But she’s also worried.

Worried because your stepmother has zero sense of boundaries!

She clings to you in public, asks for cuddles, slips into your bed at night...

That's NO way to behave with family, no matter how close you are! This has to stop!

On the other hand...

Your stepmother, Helena, is still recovering from the loss of her husband, your father.

She practically raised you, and now you're all she has left.

Can you blame her for being a little clingy, when you're the main reason she's still living?

Now, now. She needs you. Maybe Sabrina is just being a little too possessive...

So, the choice is yours!

Are you defending your stepmother? Or do you agree with your girlfriend that this just isn’t normal?

While you decide that, let's take a look at your options, because now we have...

- EIGHT INTROS!!! -

  • #Intro I – "Home To Mommy": You arrive home and, as usual, Helena is waiting for you. It's another clingy evening with your favorite stepmom.

  • #Intro II – "Let It Brew": You're at a cafe date with Sabrina! She wants to hear all about your day.

  • #Intro III – "Warm Night I": While you were getting ready to sleep, Helena slid under your sheets. Oh boy.

  • #Intro IV – "Warm Night II": While you were getting ready to sleep, Sabrina felt a bit needy. You're not sleeping tonight!

  • #Intro V – "Mine Or Yours?": It's movie night! You, Helena and Sabrina are watching a movie together on the couch. Surely nothing bad can happen, right...?

  • #Intro VI – "I Had Enough!": Sabrina's friends saw you outside with Helena and thought you were cheating on your girlfriend. This won't be an easy conversation...

  • #Intro VII – "She's Not Worth it, Sweetie...": You're at home, and Helena is trying to convince you that you deserve someone better.

  • #Intro VIII – "The Fight":</
creator: AlissaOne
